headline20: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 27 airports right now.
management45: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 27 airports right now. No engine anti-ice operations are currently flagged. Across base airports: 7 critical, 17 high, 5 medium, 10 normal. Key bases needing attention include London Luton (LTN/EGGW), London Gatwick (LGW/EGKK) and Copernicus Wrocław (WRO/EPWR); plus 21 other bases. 5 additional base airports are at medium severity and should be monitored closely. At base airports, the dominant pattern is snow-related runway contamination risk, low cloud base and mist  — most notably around Bucharest Henri Coandă (OTP/LROP), London Luton (LTN/EGGW) and Gdańsk Lech Wałęsa (GDN/EPGD). Network hotspots: Trieste–Friuli Venezia Giulia (TRS/LIPQ), Bucharest Henri Coandă (OTP/LROP), Malta (MLA/LMML), Berlin Brandenburg Willy Brandt (BER/EDDB), Birmingham (BHX/EGBB) and 22 others. Primary drivers: low cloud base, snow / blowing snow and approach minima limits. Expected impact is reduced runway capacity with higher delay and diversion risk, especially where visibility/RVR and cloud base are very low. Since the last update, 12 airports changed status, led by Trieste–Friuli Venezia Giulia (TRS/LIPQ), Bucharest Henri Coandă (OTP/LROP), Berlin Brandenburg Willy Brandt (BER/EDDB) and 9 others.
detail90: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 27 airports right now. Base airports (focus): London Luton (LTN/EGGW) — CRIT: mist; snow; visibility down to 1.2 km, cloud base around 100 ft | London Gatwick (LGW/EGKK) — HIGH: fog; visibility down to 700 m, cloud base around 100 ft | Copernicus Wrocław (WRO/EPWR) — HIGH: strong gusts risk; cloud base around 400 ft | Chişinău (RMO/LUKK) — HIGH: fog; visibility down to 400 m, RVR down to 650 m, cloud base around 100 ft | Iaşi (IAS/LRIA) — HIGH: fog; visibility down to 600 m, cloud base around 200 ft | Katowice Wojciech Korfanty (KTW/EPKT) — HIGH: mist; strong gusts risk; visibility down to 2 km, cloud base around 500 ft and 18 others. Worst affected now: Trieste–Friuli Venezia Giulia (TRS/LIPQ) — CRIT: fog; visibility down to 150 m, RVR down to 600 m, cloud base around 100 ft; below approach minima (current METAR) (drivers: low-visibility takeoff restrictions, runway visual range (RVR) constraints, approach minima limits) | Bucharest Henri Coandă (OTP/LROP) — CRIT: fog; visibility down to 100 m, RVR down to 200 m, cloud base around 100 ft; below approach minima (current METAR) (drivers: low-visibility procedures (reduced capacity), runway visual range (RVR) constraints, approach minima limits) | Malta (MLA/LMML) — CRIT: strong gusts risk; cloud base around 0 ft (drivers: operational constraints) | Berlin Brandenburg Willy Brandt (BER/EDDB) — CRIT: snow; visibility down to 2.5 km, cloud base around 300 ft (drivers: low ceilings, snow/blowing snow) | Birmingham (BHX/EGBB) — CRIT: snow; visibility down to 2 km, cloud base around 400 ft (drivers: low ceilings, snow/blowing snow) | London Luton (LTN/EGGW) — CRIT: mist; snow; visibility down to 1.2 km, cloud base around 100 ft (drivers: low ceilings, mist, snow/blowing snow) and 21 others. Changed since last run: Trieste–Friuli Venezia Giulia (TRS/LIPQ), Bucharest Henri Coandă (OTP/LROP), Berlin Brandenburg Willy Brandt (BER/EDDB), Birmingham (BHX/EGBB), London Luton (LTN/EGGW), Stavanger Airport, Sola (SVG/ENZV), Gdańsk Lech Wałęsa (GDN/EPGD), Poznań-Ławica (POZ/EPPO), Solidarity Szczecin–Goleniów (SZZ/EPSC), Olsztyn-Mazury (SZY/EPSY) and 2 others.
